productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Green Pooh Tiger Kidswear
description: CompositionMint green t-shirt in 100% cotton with contrast blue neckline and blue stitch detailing along sleeve and shirt hemWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitAs happy as a kookaburra, this green tee with a joyful Pooh and Tigger print ups the fun element in your child's outfit. The pur cotton fabric will keep him dry and comfortable while he enjoys an outing or romps around the park with his friends. Team this sunny t-shirt with denim shorts or three quarters for an enjoyable outing or a fun ride on the bicycle after school. Add on footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, and make your handsome young man feel comfortable in style.
